title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Reiju, Unknown person #4, Big Mom as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that method will take the whole night, won't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't have that sort of time. We'll bake it in two hours!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why are you grinning to yourself?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Be more serious about this, black leg!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your ship and the lives of your crew, along with the lives of those in this country, are on the line right now, you know!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thinking about big mom calling this cake "delicious" with a delighted face.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: thinking about... Her delighted face!? You...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you realize that your life is in danger?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's so good, that I could die right now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way they didn't put any in it!! It just didn't work on Mama, as expected!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 36 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
